Our Products & Services

Complete Petrochemical Solutions

From bitumen emulsion production to road overlay services, we provide end-to-end solutions for Tanzania's infrastructure needs.

💧

Bitumen Emulsion

ColaBinder brand — CRS-40, CRS-60, CSS-1h, CSS-60, SS-60. Cationic and anionic emulsions for tack coat, prime coat, and seal coat applications.

🛤️

Cold Mix Asphalt (LAMI BARIDI)

Pre-packed and bulk CMA under ColaRMix brand — Colamix 103, Super Colamix 145, Deluxe Colamix 210. Ready-to-apply road surfacing.

⛽

Penetration Grade Bitumen

Full range of pen grades: 35/50, 40/50, 50/70, 60/70, 80/100, 150/200 for road construction and industrial applications.

🧪

Cut Backs & Performance Grades

MC 30, MC 70, MC 250, MC 3000 cut backs and Performance Grades PG 70-10, PG 70-22, PG 76-10.

🔧

Industrial Lubricants

Conventional and specialty lubricants for various industries — keeping Tanzania's machinery and vehicles running efficiently.

🔨

Road Overlay & Paving

CMA pavement overlay for homes, private and public spaces — elevating appearance while increasing property value.

🚛

CMA Equipment Hire

Asphalt distributors, compactors, concrete mixers, sprayer pumps and more — professional equipment for your road projects.

👷

Technical Consulting

Expert guidance on bitumen emulsion technology, road construction best practices, and cold mix asphalt applications.

Our Projects

Major Infrastructure Projects

Starpeco has supplied materials for some of Tanzania's most important road infrastructure projects.

Kijazi Interchange

Bitumen emulsion supply for major interchange construction

BRT Phase 2 & 3

Cold mix asphalt for Dar es Salaam rapid transit corridors

Performance grade bitumen for flyover road surfacing

UDSM Campus Roads

Kileleni, Uvumbuzi & Changanyikeni road construction

Nyerere Airport Terminal 3

Cold mix asphalt pavement overlay at Tanzania's main airport

Dodoma City Roads

Patching works on Magufuli & Samia roads using LAMI BARIDI

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What products does Starpeco manufacture?
We produce Bitumen Emulsion under the ColaBinder brand (CRS-40, CRS-60, CSS-1h, CSS-60, SS-60), Cold Mix Asphalt (LAMI BARIDI) under the ColaRMix brand, and Cut Backs (MC 30, MC 70, MC 250, MC 3000). We also import and distribute Penetration Grade Bitumen and Performance Grade products.
What is Cold Mix Asphalt (LAMI BARIDI)?
LAMI BARIDI is a ready-to-use mixture of bitumen emulsion and aggregates for road overlay. It comes in pre-packed and bulk forms — Colamix 103, Super Colamix 145, and Deluxe Colamix 210. It's ideal for road maintenance, patching, and overlaying surfaces in homes, airports, and public spaces.
Where is Starpeco located?
Our production facility and office are located at Kinyerezi, Mwembeni Street, Opposite Mount Meru Petrol Station, Majumba Sita to Kinyerezi Road, Plot No. 905 & 907, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania. We have over 6,000m² of fenced storage facility.
What is Starpeco's production capacity?
Our ultra-modern bitumen emulsion plant from OKURMAKINA has a production capacity of 20,000 litres per hour. Our Cut Back plant can produce 60,000 litres per day. We installed a second emulsion plant unit in 2023 to meet growing demand.
Do you offer equipment hire services?
Yes! We provide hiring services for Cold Mix Asphalt (CMA) equipment including asphalt distributors, compactors, concrete mixers, sprayer pumps, and more for road construction and maintenance projects.
What certifications does Starpeco hold?
We are registered with TRA (TIN: 105-049-420, VAT: 10-019329-V), EWURA, Chief Chemist Government Lab Agency (No. 0622), NeST as a registered vendor, and the United Nations (Vendor No. 214596 since 2012). We also hold an Environmental Impact Assessment Certificate.
Can you overlay CMA in residential properties?
Absolutely! We overlay Cold Mix Asphalt pavement in homes, private and public spaces. This elevates the look of your property while increasing its value. Notable projects include Ardhi University ladies' hostel and Nyerere Airport Terminal 3.
How can I contact Starpeco?
Call us at +255 782 835 507 / +255 754 835 507, email info@starpeco.co.tz, or visit our website at www.starpeco.co.tz. You can also visit our facility in Kinyerezi, Dar es Salaam.
